title: nextflow-best-practices pipeline parameters
description: A demonstration of advanced Nextflow and nf-core best practices.

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input.description: Path to a CSV samplesheet with columns: sample, fastq_1, fastq_2, strandedness.
input.help_text: The samplesheet must be a comma-separated file with a header row. `fastq_2` is optional (omit for single-end data). Strandedness must be one of `forward`, `reverse`, or `unstranded`.
input.errorMessage: Samplesheet must be a CSV file with no spaces and extension '.csv'

outdir.description: Directory where results will be saved.

workflow_control.title: Workflow control options
workflow_control.description: Control which workflow stages to execute.

stages.description: List of workflow stages to execute. Valid values: 'clean', 'quantify'
stages.help_text: Use ['clean'] for clean_data.nf, ['quantify'] for quant_data.nf, or ['clean', 'quantify'] for main.nf

reference_genome_options.title: Reference genome options
reference_genome_options.description: Reference genome files required when 'quantify' step is included.

genome_fasta.errorMessage: Genome FASTA must have extension '.fa', '.fasta', or '.fna' (optionally gzipped)

gtf.description: Genome annotation file in GTF format.
gtf.errorMessage: GTF file must have extension '.gtf' or '.gtf.gz'

transcript_fasta.description: Transcript sequences in FASTA format (used by Salmon in alignment-free mode).
transcript_fasta.errorMessage: Transcript FASTA must have extension '.fa', '.fasta', or '.fna' (optionally gzipped)

generic_options.title: Generic options
generic_options.description: Less common options for the pipeline, typically set in a config file.

modules_testdata_base_path.description: Base URL or path for nf-core test datasets. Used by nf-test.
